---
title: "Demonstrating aisstream"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Demonstrating aisstream}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  fig.width = 8,
  fig.height = 5,
  dpi = 150,
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

## Introduction

This vignette demonstrates the example function in `aisstream`:

1. `add()` - A simple R function to add two numbers

```{r setup}
box::use(aisstream[ add ])
```

## Using the add() function

The `add()` function is a simple R function that adds two numbers:
```{r add-demo}
add(2, 3)
add(10.5, 20.3)
add(-5, 5)
```
